content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward methods (ICM, RND) can be repurposed as the dynamic exploration gate for hybrid planning-learning systems, where curious agents prioritize which subproblems to solve via trial-and-error learning vs. reuse via structured episodic planning, rather than only using curiosity to encourage exploration within a single trajectory. This creates a self-tuning hybrid system that automatically allocates compute between learning and planning based on the agent's current uncertainty.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
